item.title: Search Ended For Missing Brendan Thomas Santo
item.description: The search for Brendan Thomas Santo concludes, with a factual account of the efforts made and the outcome, presented respectfully and clearly.

media:content.media:title: Search Ended For Missing Brendan Thomas Santo
media:content.media:description: The search for Brendan Thomas Santo concludes, with a factual account of the efforts made and the outcome, presented respectfully and clearly.

item.title: The 1996 Olympics attack that shocked the world
item.description: A factual overview of the terrorist bombing at the 1996 Summer Olympics in Atlanta’s Centennial Olympic Park, where a pipe bomb killed one spectator, injured over 100 people, and led to a long investigation that eventually identified Eric Robert Rudolph as the perpetrator.

media:content.media:title: The 1996 Olympics attack that shocked the world
media:content.media:description: A factual overview of the terrorist bombing at the 1996 Summer Olympics in Atlanta’s Centennial Olympic Park, where a pipe bomb killed one spectator, injured over 100 people, and led to a long investigation that eventually identified Eric Robert Rudolph as the perpetrator.

item.title: Finally Answers For The 'Days Inn' Cold Case!
item.description: A look at the resolution of the ‘Days Inn’ cold case, exploring key evidence, investigative breakthroughs, and answers uncovered after years of uncertainty.

media:content.media:title: Finally Answers For The 'Days Inn' Cold Case!
media:content.media:description: A look at the resolution of the ‘Days Inn’ cold case, exploring key evidence, investigative breakthroughs, and answers uncovered after years of uncertainty.

item.title: Case Cracked Using A Single Coffee Cup
item.description: A look at how investigators cracked a case using a single coffee cup, highlighting the evidence, analysis, and key discoveries.

media:content.media:title: Case Cracked Using A Single Coffee Cup
media:content.media:description: A look at how investigators cracked a case using a single coffee cup, highlighting the evidence, analysis, and key discoveries.

item.title: The truth behind the Brendan Santo case
item.description: The mysterious disappearance of Brendan Santo raises haunting questions and troubling truths.

media:content.media:title: The truth behind the Brendan Santo case
media:content.media:description: The mysterious disappearance of Brendan Santo raises haunting questions and troubling truths.
